extra.reason: text=text mode validated: real <text>+<tspan>, fonts preserved, images survive, 5-14x smaller. Switched pdfImport.ts. See docs/stocktake/06.
fileio.ts drawingTags whitelist now includes 'image'; added regression test
cachedCandidates now stores pre-split {x[], y[]} instead of a mixed list with per-frame filter; computeSmartGuides is pure lookup. 10 tests still green.

Scale transform prepended to each element's transform attribute instead of wrapping in a group; each text/image/g is now a direct layer child and individually selectable. Live verification confirms click on 'Document with Image' selects just the <text>, not the whole page.
computeTranslateAttrsAll added + selectTool now snapshots and shifts tspan x/y arrays. 5 new unit tests for the shift function + live verification on real PDF confirms glyphs move as a coherent unit.

sanitizeSvgTree() strips <script>/<foreignObject>/<iframe>/on*-attributes/javascript:-hrefs; called from parseSvgString AND clipboard paste. Tauri CSP set to default-src 'self' with explicit data:/blob:/wasm exceptions. 11 new tests.

Deleted 2126 LOC: tikzExport, offsetPath, textPath, compoundPath, pathBooleans, clipping, opacityMask model modules + tests; SwatchPanel + swatches; scissors+knife tools + icons; matching App.tsx imports and ~190 lines of Object menu items. Removed paper dep. 437 tests green (was 489, deleted tests removed). Main bundle ~20KB smaller + paper chunk 359KB eliminated.

HIDDEN_TOOLS expanded to hide 6 pure-authoring tools (pen/pencil/measure/lasso/free-transform/eyedropper); cold-pickup now sees 7 tools (select, line, rectangle, ellipse, eraser, text, direct-select). Keyboard shortcuts still work for hidden tools.

AGENTS.md rewritten from scratch: concise pivot statement + current-state snapshot + honest 'what's not here' list + workflow commands. API.md surgical rewrites: orientation block, File I/O section (adds exportPdf/exportPng/placeImage/importPdf/sanitizeSvgTree), Tools section (5→13 with visibility column), keybindings (5→13), Components (deletes Toolbar, adds ToolStrip/MenuBar/ControlBar/FillStrokeWidget/Ruler/ContextMenu).

cachedCandidates now stores pre-split {x[], y[]} instead of a mixed list with per-frame filter; computeSmartGuides is pure lookup. 10 tests still green.

HIDDEN_TOOLS expanded to hide 6 pure-authoring tools (pen/pencil/measure/lasso/free-transform/eyedropper); cold-pickup now sees 7 tools (select, line, rectangle, ellipse, eraser, text, direct-select). Keyboard shortcuts still work for hidden tools.

AGENTS.md rewritten from scratch: concise pivot statement + current-state snapshot + honest 'what's not here' list + workflow commands. API.md surgical rewrites: orientation block, File I/O section (adds exportPdf/exportPng/placeImage/importPdf/sanitizeSvgTree), Tools section (5→13 with visibility column), keybindings (5→13), Components (deletes Toolbar, adds ToolStrip/MenuBar/ControlBar/FillStrokeWidget/Ruler/ContextMenu).

New pdfRender.worker.ts; pdfImport.ts posts {pdf: ArrayBuffer, pageIndex} (zero-copy transfer), awaits {svg} or {error} response. Worker reused across imports. vite.config.ts: worker.format='es'. Main thread no longer blocks on WASM load.

8 singletons wrapped in state classes with swappable active pointers. documentState.ts aggregates; setActiveDocument(d) atomically swaps every module pointer. EditorContext captures and activates one DocumentState at mount. 9 new isolation tests prove multi-doc state independence. Zero consumer-code churn (wrapper pattern).

pdfImport.ts:applyParsedSvg was still inserting MuPDF's anonymous top-level <g> as a single-child of the synthetic layer (from parseSvgString's no-data-layer-name fallback), giving 'one wrapper + N grandchildren' instead of 'N direct layer children'. Fix: extracted flattenAndScalePdfLayer(layer, scale) that detects single-<g>-child wrappers (no data-layer-name/id/class) and promotes their children one level up while composing wrapper.transform with the scale prefix; falls through to per-child scale if no wrapper is present. 7 new unit tests. 453 tests green (was 446). Live-verified with temp/Flyer*.pdf via playwright: 112 direct layer children post-import (was 1); clicking 'Kurzfristige Hilfe bei englischen Vorträgen' selects the 148.99x10.76 mm headline (was 210x297 mm full page).

Added 4 z-order items to Object menu between Flip (transforms group) and Convert to Path (path ops group), separated by dividers: Bring to Front (Ctrl+Shift+]), Bring Forward (Ctrl+]), Send Backward (Ctrl+[), Send to Back (Ctrl+Shift+[). Wired to existing zOrder.ts functions; keyboard shortcuts already worked, now also discoverable via menu. Fixed MenuBar wrap by adding whitespace-nowrap so long labels don't line-break. Live-verified: menu opens, shows 3 logical groups, shortcuts aligned right, items correctly disabled when no selection. All 453 tests green.

Added File > Open PDF as Background Layer... menu item. Imports a PDF as a new <g data-layer-name> positioned BEFORE existing layers (bottom of z-stack = rendered first = behind). Layer name = filename minus '.pdf' extension, truncated to 40 chars with ellipsis; empty/whitespace stems fall back to 'Background'. Reuses flattenAndScalePdfLayer so new layer has direct children (not wrappers). Does not touch viewBox or clear existing layers; defs are appended. Bug found and fixed during verification: clearSelection() was being called BEFORE the layer insertion, so LayersPanel's selection subscription saw the old state; moved to end of function. Live-verified against temp/Flyer*.pdf — 3-click composite (Open PDF noheader.pdf → Open PDF as Background Layer yellow BG.pdf → done). Both layers show in Layers panel with correct names and z-order. 8 new unit tests: insertion position, existing-layer preservation, viewBox not touched, pt→mm scale applied, filename sanitization (strip extension, truncate, Background fallback). 461 tests green.

Phase A landed: scaffold test/roundtrip/{fixtures,golden,helpers}/, normalizeSvg helper (10 tests), renderPdfPageToPng helper (4 tests), extracted pure renderPdfPageToSvg from worker into src/model/pdfRender.ts, pdfPipeline composer (3 tests). 478/478 green, tsc clean. AGENTS.md pointer added. Unblocks vectorfeld-9s9 + cd2 for TDD red-green.

Production File > Export PDF now uses pdf-lib engine (src/model/pdfExport.ts) end-to-end. Replaces svg2pdf.js + jsPDF for export. Text content survives PDF round-trip; <g transform> composes through walker matrix; primitives (text, path, rect, line, ellipse, circle, image) all supported. 491/491 tests green incl. 13 new round-trip integration tests with extractPdfTextItems position-aware assertions. Bundle: jspdf still imported by test fixture generators; svg2pdf.js fully unwired. Follow-up beads for: bundle cleanup, font-family preservation beyond Helvetica, rotation/skew on rect/ellipse becoming paths.

Reframed per empirical finding (2026-04-20): pdfjs-dist returns same 15 chars as MuPDF on yellow-BG flyer, confirming text was outlined-to-paths AT SOURCE PDF GENERATION (designer outlined fonts pre-delivery). Not recoverable as text by any extraction engine without OCR. Shipped: (a) analyzeImportedSvg heuristic detector in src/model/importAnalysis.ts (path-to-text-char ratio with calibrated thresholds), (b) tagLayerWithImportAnalysis hook in pdfImport.ts that sets data-mostly-outlined / data-text-chars / data-path-count + console.warn, (c) ⚠ badge in LayersPanel.tsx with explanatory tooltip. 503/503 tests green incl. 9 analyzer + 3 wiring tests. Filed vectorfeld-pr9 for the orthogonal Type 3 charproc case (where pdfjs-dist CAN extract text MuPDF doesn't — but no fixture currently exhibits that).

safeEncode wrapper in pdfExport.ts catches WinAnsi encoding failures, drops unencodable chars per char with structured console.warn (codepoint listed). Composite-via-playwright now succeeds: 505/505 tests green incl. 2 new encoding tests; composite.pdf delivered (260KB, 1 page, A4); 48 text items extractable via pdfjs-dist getTextContent including German Üöä; only 8 ◊ bullets dropped from the noheader flyer (filed vectorfeld-jc6 for Unicode TTF embedding to preserve those).

Both bugs fixed: walk() now applies leaf transforms; drawText iterates tspans. 4 new failing-then-green tests in svgToPdfRoundtrip.test.ts. Real-PDF composite-via-playwright now produces a visually-correct composite.pdf (verified in headed Chrome PDF viewer). 509/509 tests green.

drawText now iterates per character when tspan x/y is a space-separated list. Real-flyer dogfood via headed Chromium: all body text reads cleanly (entlaste durch, Lektorat bei, Erfahrung all now correctly spaced). 3 new tests, 509→512 green. Commit 1d6dbf9.

Embedded Carlito (Calibri clone) + Liberation Serif (Playfair Display substitute) via @pdf-lib/fontkit. Non-WinAnsi chars like ◊ now survive Export PDF. Real-flyer composite visually matches source fonts at the glyph level. Commit a8d2fe6.

PASS. 2.17M pixels rendered at 150 DPI via pdftoppm; zero differ between source and grafted-and-saved output. All 10 embedded font subsets preserved with original 6-letter prefixes (NQVAEI+/VKURMS+/BAAAAA+/CAAAAA+ for Calibri + Playfair Display variants). pdftotext output identical. Page dims identical. File size went 2.6MB→1.6MB (graft drops unused cross-page objects). Artifacts: temp/spike-01-verdict.md, temp/spike-01-graft.pdf, temp/spike-01-diff.png.

PASS. Proved both overlay paths: (a) referencing existing grafted source font — works but limited to source's subset glyphs (e.g. Calibri-regular subset had no capital K/H). (b) Embedding our own font (Carlito) into grafted doc via addSimpleFont, registering in page Resources/Font, referencing via new content stream — FULL TEXT renders in green Carlito at bottom-left of page. Source content byte-perfect. pdftotext extracts both cleanly. This is the production pattern for overlays. Artifacts: scripts/spike/02-graft-overlay.mjs, scripts/spike/02b-embed-new-font.mjs, temp/spike-02b-shot-1.png, temp/spike-02-verdict.md.

PASS. Custom tokenizer 120 LOC (table-driven per PDF spec §7.8.2) parsed 16KB source content stream into 4264 tokens in 13ms. Op histogram: 106 TJ (array form, per-char positioning), 106 BT/ET text blocks, 112 q/Q save/restore, 27 BDC (tagged content markers — preserved through graft). Zero Tj (plain); source uses TJ exclusively. Finding specific TEXT requires ToUnicode CMap decoding (CID Identity-H fonts use 2-byte glyph indices, not WinAnsi chars) — tractable, +~100 LOC. Phase 3 total: ~250 LOC for tokenizer + CMap + rewrite. tempspike-03-findings.md + scripts/spike/03-parse-opstream.mjs captured.
Swapped src/index.css @theme to oklch Atrium palette verbatim. 18 new tests pass; 531/531 total green. Commit in tree.
Ported 4 palettes + Palette type + palettes record to src/theme/atrium.ts. 5 new tests pass.
Panel wrapper shipped with 5 passing tests covering data-role, CSS-var surface, style/className passthrough.
IconGlyph + 28-glyph ICONS + IconLabels shipped. 7 new tests pass. Clean tsc -b.
Alias map ships with 15 passing tests covering all 13 registered tools + passthrough.
Deleted src/components/icons.tsx. ToolStrip swapped to IconGlyph+iconKeyForTool. 563/563 tests green; clean tsc.
Layout restructured to Atrium floating panels. 7 new tests pass, 570 total green, clean tsc, headed screenshot captured.
LeftRail ships with 9-slot roster, accent pill, brush+knife disabled, overflow menu. 7 new tests pass; 577 total green; clean tsc; headed screenshots captured.
TopBar ships with brand, menus, tab stub, Split, Export PDF. 6 new tests; 583 total green. Headed-chrome dogfood caught overflow:hidden clipping bug, fixed.
StatusBar shipped with saved dot, page nav, cursor, zoom pill. 5 tests; 588/588 total green. Headed screenshot captured.
LayersPanel restyled with tabs, accent row, thumb, mostly-outlined badge. 3 tests; 591 total green. Headed screenshot.
InspectorPanel ships with selection header, Frame+Style sections, merged Layers tab. Tested with real drawing interaction. 6 tests; 598 total green.
Ruler repalettted + thinned to 14px with Atrium tokens. 598/598 green. Headed screenshot.
FillStrokeWidget, ColorPicker, ContextMenu, ArtboardDialog all restyled to Atrium treatment. 598/598 tests green. Headed ArtboardDialog screenshot captured.
Bundled Inter (400/500/600) + JetBrains Mono 400 via @font-face. No CDN; CSP untouched. 600/600 tests green. Fonts confirmed loaded in headed chrome.
All 4 dogfood gates pass: empty state, draw/select, File menu, real-PDF composite. 600/600 vitest green. One real bug caught (LeftRail subscribe-after-notify) + fixed.
All 4 dogfood gates pass: empty state, draw/select, File menu, real-PDF composite. 600/600 vitest green. One real bug caught (LeftRail subscribe-after-notify) + fixed.

Atrium UI redesign shipped end to end. 15 sub-beads (0a/0b/0c/1a/1b/1c/2/3a/3b/3c/3d/3e/3f/3g/4/5a/5b) closed via red-green TDD + headed-Chromium dogfood. 600/600 vitest green across 49 files (+37 new Atrium tests). Real-PDF compositing regression intact. Two real bugs caught via dogfood: TopBar overflow clipping, LeftRail subscribe-race.

Phase 1 shipped: test/golden/ harness + canonicalize (SVG + pdfjs PDF extract) + runner (record/verify/accept modes) + 5 stories green against committed masters. Determinism fixes landed in pdfExport.ts (pinned CreationDate/ModDate/Producer/Creator). Failure path proven by perturbation test. Stories 6-20 filed as follow-on beads u7s/00r/44a/6yf/n87/x0x. npm run golden / golden:record / golden:accept wired. AGENTS.md updated.

Phase 1 shipped: test/golden/milestones/ with 10 tool-combo fixtures + drivers, semanticCanonical.mjs (shape-to-path, hex-colors, app-chrome strip), milestone.mjs runner with ✓/✗/— scoreboard, npm run golden:milestones wired. Initial scoreboard: 1✓ 4✗ 5— — milestone 01 (rotated-rect via Frame X/Y/W/H/R) is green end-to-end, proving the harness works. Real bugs surfaced: vectorfeld-cj3 (copy/paste) and vectorfeld-qum (ellipse Frame math). AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md clearly distinguish gates (CI blocker) from milestones (scoreboard, never blocks).

Milestone 05 green via alt-approach: compute a blue-only overlap point (mm 85,140 within blue but outside green) and click it. The underlying 'select after multi-draw doesn't land' issue was that my earlier driver clicked at a point that was off-canvas (blue extended past the viewport); fixing the offset fixed the selection. No actual app bug — driver geometry was wrong.

Sharded 791-line AGENTS.md into 7 per-session worklog files at docs/worklog/. Rewrote AGENTS.md (179 lines) and CLAUDE.md (87 lines) to Boris Cherny tightness. Moved dogfood gates from temp/ to test/dogfood/ with npm run dogfood. Deleted 119 path-changes worth of cruft: 01-initial.png, design/, design-drop/, review/ (13MB 2021 audio), test-benchmarks/, docs/research, docs/reviews, docs/redesign-atrium/, vectorfeld-prd.md, stocktake culled to source-map only, temp/ post-relocation. 600/600 tests green, type check clean, pushed to main as 8503518.

SourcePdfStore added to DocumentState. SourcePdfStore class with primary slot + backgrounds Map keyed by layer name, each entry { bytes: Uint8Array, filename, pageCount, mupdfHandle? }. Active-pointer pattern matches the other state modules. pdfImport.ts forks bytes (slice(0)) so worker gets a transferable while main retains its copy; both importPdf and importPdfAsBackgroundLayer call recordImportedSource after render. pdfRender protocol now forwards pageCount alongside svg. 610/610 unit tests, 5/5 golden gates, 10/10 milestones, dogfood end-to-end works. Commit 3067f1b on main. Unblocks vectorfeld-wjj.

Tagged imported leaf graphical elements with data-src-page + data-src-layer-id via new src/model/sourceTagging.ts (95 LOC + 13 tests). Imported layer gets data-source-pdf-id (stable across rename). PRIMARY_LAYER_ID sentinel for primary imports; sanitized filename for backgrounds (matches SourcePdfStore key). Helpers: getSourceMeta, isFromSource, getLayerSourceId, lookupSourceEntry. Wired into both pdfImport paths. Canonicalizer strip list extended so masters stay byte-stable. data-src-op-offset deferred to Phase 3 (needs ~250 LOC tokenizer+CMap, graft engine doesn't need it). 623/623 unit, 5/5 golden, 10/10 milestones. Unblocks wjj.

Added Command.touchesSource() (optional method) + commandTouchesSource(cmd) helper across all 7 commands. AddElement: false; Remove/Modify/Reorder: isFromSource(element); Group/Ungroup: any child isFromSource; Compound: OR of children. 7 new tests, 630/630 unit, 5/5 golden, 10/10 milestones. No behavior change yet — graft engine (wjj) reads it.

Snapshot WeakMap + 3 helpers (snapshotImportedElements, isElementModified, findModifiedSourceElements). Wired into both pdfImport paths. 13 new tests covering create/isolate/mutate(add/remove/change)/order/nested/untagged. Attribute-only scope; textContent stays at the Command.touchesSource layer. 643/643 unit, 5/5 golden, 10/10 milestones.

classifyLayer(layer, store) returns graft | mixed | overlay. graft: src + no edits. mixed: src + modified-since-import or new untagged leaves (returns lists of each). overlay: no src or store-miss. Looks up bytes via lookupSourceEntry (PRIMARY_LAYER_ID or background name). 8 new tests, 651/651 unit, 5/5 golden, 10/10 milestones. Pure, no DOM mutation.

openSourcePdfDoc(bytes), createEmptyPdfDoc(), closeSourcePdfDoc(doc) wrapping mupdf.PDFDocument lifecycle. Cached dynamic import('mupdf') resolves once per session. Production keeps mupdf in worker for render; graft re-opens on main thread to avoid postMessage round-trips per primitive. 3 new tests, 654/654 unit.
graftSourcePageInto(outDoc, srcDoc, srcPageIdx) wrapping mupdf.graftPage(-1, …). 3 new tests verifying append, multi-source order, source not mutated. 657/657 unit tests.

elementBboxMm(el), mmBboxToPdfPt(bbox, pageHeightPt), elementBboxPdfPt(el, pageHeightPt). Per-element local bbox (rect/circle/ellipse/line/path/polygon/image/text) composed with ancestor transforms. Text uses conservative ascender+descender approx (overshoot safe for masking). 14 new tests, 671/671 unit.

Shipped src/model/graftCs.ts (255 LOC) + 37 tests. Pure emitter for rect/line/ellipse/circle/path → PDF op strings. Decomposes shapes to PathCommand[] in mm-space, transforms each point individually (correct under rotation), emits m/l/c/h ops with Y-flip. emitMaskRectOp keeps re-form. Determinism pinned via 3-decimal fmt. 708 tests green, tsc clean. Commit 0f3b468.

Shipped appendContentStream + registerOverlayFont in graftMupdf.ts (+74 LOC) + 8 tests (graftMupdf.overlay.test.ts, +229 LOC). Mirrors spike-02 stream-append (handles single-ref + array /Contents) and spike-2b font-embed (defensive against pages without /Resources/Font). 716 tests green, tsc clean. Commit f95b4d2.

Shipped emitText + FontRegistry interface in graftCs.ts (+148 LOC) + 22 tests in graftCsText.test.ts (+254 LOC). Mirrors pdfExport.drawText: tspan inheritance, per-char x-array unrolling, font-size scaling. Uses absolute Tm per run, suppresses redundant Tf/rg. PDF string escape for parens+backslash. 738 unit tests green, tsc clean. Commit 30ff4cf.

Shipped src/model/graftExport.ts (299 LOC) + 8 integration tests (179 LOC). exportViaGraft composes the seven graft primitives via per-layer dispatch (graft/mixed/overlay). Page bootstrap requires insertPage after addPage on fresh docs (caught via TDD). Single Carlito font for MVP. Deterministic byte output verified. 746 tests green, tsc clean. Commit 1cd7f71.

Engine landed via hnj (commit 1cd7f71). All sub-beads (wjj-1..9: tsi, fx8, 68p, 2oi, am6, uuz, e1j, ne4, hnj) closed and composed into src/model/graftExport.ts. wjj was the meta tracking item; engine works end-to-end and is verified by 8 integration tests. Next: u7r wires it into fileio.ts exportPdf.

Shipped 5 headed-Chromium golden gate stories. Each verified byte-stable on first pass via npm run golden. Stories 06/10 mutate DOM directly (group-drill-in is a future bead; gate verifies export bytes which only depend on final DOM state); stories 07/08/09 drive the full UI path (file-chooser PDF imports, drag-select+clipboard+arrow-key nudge, pen-tool drag-anchor smooth handles). 10/10 gates green. Commit d92b4cc.

Shipped 5 headed-Chromium golden gate stories. Each verified byte-stable on first pass via npm run golden. Stories 06/10 mutate DOM directly (group-drill-in is a future bead; gate verifies export bytes which only depend on final DOM state); stories 07/08/09 drive the full UI path (file-chooser PDF imports, drag-select+clipboard+arrow-key nudge, pen-tool drag-anchor smooth handles). 10/10 gates green. Commit d92b4cc.

Refactored exportViaGraft to single-page-stacking. Foundation = first graft/mixed in DOM order; non-foundation layers render via overlay (lossy for non-foundation graft, acceptable MVP). MediaBox follows foundation source PDF when grafting. Net 7 LOC down despite new logic. 750 unit tests green. Unblocks u7r.

Wired graftExport into fileio.exportPdf via new exportPdfBytes(doc, opts) helper. Conservative MVP gate fires only for clean import+export (no edits, no backgrounds). Story 05 now produces byte-perfect source preservation (verified via pdftoppm render — full flyer with original fonts intact). Other PDF-import gates stay on pdf-lib until graft engine handles deletions (filed below) and per-source fonts (yyj). 757 unit tests + 10/10 gates green. Commit 0e8b7bc.

Shipped test/roundtrip/graftRoundtrip.test.ts (146 LOC, 2 tests). Pixel-diff verification of graft engine against the noheader flyer source: ≤0.5% threshold, expected near-0 per spike-01. Uses pdftoppm rasterization (sidesteps pdfjs+node-canvas inline-image bug). Runs in node env with JSDOM globals. Plus a sanity check that output isn't pdf-lib-sized (catches gate-fallback regressions). 759 unit tests + 10/10 gates green. Commit ae3ce52.

Shipped engine-side deletion tracking (sourceSnapshot registry + classifyLayer.removedBboxes + graftExport mask emission). Synthetic tests verify mask emission. Production gate stays strict pending textBox rebuild — visually verified that imported-text bbox is mis-located for MuPDF tspan-wrapped text. Filed follow-up. 769 unit tests + 10/10 gates green.

Spike 04 confirmed mupdf-js applyRedactions rewrites the content stream — both mupdf.asText and pdfjs.getTextContent agree the redacted text is gone. Plan A holds; ~15 LOC change instead of 250 LOC. See docs/spikes/spike-04-verdict.md (commit b0cead0).

Shipped applyRedactionsToPage in graftMupdf.ts. Internal y-flip from PdfRect (bottom-up) to mupdf-display (top-down). Two unit tests in graftMupdf.redact.test.ts cover the production path (PdfRect input) and the empty-rects no-op. Commit e7171e9. 777 unit tests green.

extractPdfText wraps extractPdfTextItems, returns joined string. 3 helper tests (needle present, parity with items, blank-page returns ''). Used as the verification target for enf-3 graft-deletion checks. Commit 015ad3a.

Replaced emitMaskRectOp band-aid with applyRedactionsToPage in graftExport. Order: graft → redact foundation → append overlay (so overlay isn't redacted by the same pass). Both deletions and modifications go through redaction; emitMaskRectOp deleted from graftCs entirely. New pdfjs-based test in graftExport.test.ts verifies a deleted text element is gone from getTextContent. tsc clean, 778 unit tests + 10/10 gates green. Commit c00c50c.

Shipped: shouldUseGraftEngine accepts deletions-only mixed layers; gate 06 master regenerated and verified (deleted headline absent from pdfjs getTextContent, 44 surviving text items, source-dimension page); story 06 now has explicit defense-in-depth assertion that the deleted text is gone from pdfjs output. Architectural fix complete: applyRedactions excises text/line-art ops at the content-stream level, not visual masking. 778/778 unit tests + 10/10 gates green. Commit ccfc241.
